word: H982 - בָּטַח - bâṭach - baw-takh' - Be bold

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּטח

Transliteration: bâṭach

Phonetic: baw-takh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to trust
    1. (Qal)
      1. to trust, trust in
      2. to have confidence, be confident
      3. to be bold
      4. to be secure
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to cause to trust, make secure
  2. (TWOT) to feel safe, be careless

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 233

Part(s) of speech: Verb
